summary: Tighten capture/plan/implement cross-references and skills/README.md after analyze removal
description:
After b2fdf342 deletes /todo-analyze, every other skill needs a small
cleanup pass:

- skills/todo-capture/SKILL.md: 'After Capture — Which Skill Next?' table
  removes the 'Root cause is unknown → todo-analyze' row (or redirects to
  todo-triage). Add clearer note that for multi-step work, jump straight to
  /todo-plan instead of capture-then-plan.
- skills/todo-plan/SKILL.md: clarify in 'When to Use' that plan subsumes
  capture for the parent — no need to invoke /todo-capture first.
- skills/todo-implement/SKILL.md: step 2b ('spec wrong or incomplete')
  becomes the canonical home for mid-flight analyze-the-CLI-primitive usage.
  Add an explicit 'For deep investigations, see /todo-triage' pointer.
- skills/README.md: update the skill list (5 → 4) and the relationships
  diagram if present.
- All frontmatter 'related_skills' arrays: remove todo-analyze references.

Done contract: no skill file mentions /todo-analyze; all 'next skill'
pointers resolve to one of capture/triage/plan/implement; README skill
list is current.

Depends on: b2fdf342 (the analyze→triage merge must land first).

resolution.note: All /todo-analyze references removed across capture, plan, implement, and README. Cross-skill 'next step' pointers now resolve cleanly to capture/triage/plan/implement only. Implement step 2b added as canonical home for mid-flight 'todo analyze' CLI usage.
